translations.#### [入金 $10,000 美元以上，可以申請最高為 $25 美元手續費補: #### [Deposit $10,000 USD or more to apply for a wire fee rebate up to $25 USD](https://www.firstrade.com/zh-TW/accounts/wire-fee-rebate){:target="_blank"}

translations.#### 自然人憑證申請\n\n: #### Applying for a Citizen Digital Certificate
translations.(客服視訊後) 升級帳戶：單筆最高 5 萬、每日最高 10萬、每月最高 20 萬: (After customer service video call) Account upgrade: maximum NT$50,000 per transaction, NT$100,000 per day, NT$200,000 per month.
translations.(自然人憑證+客服視訊後) 約定帳戶：單筆最高 50 萬。\n: (After Natural Person Certificate + Customer Service Video Verification) Designated Account: Maximum NT$500,000 per transaction.
translations.(請使用電腦版) 登入 Firstrade 後選擇：\n\n: (Please use the desktop version) After logging into Firstrade, select:
translations.(開戶後即享) 基本帳戶：單筆最高 1 萬、每日最高 3 萬、每月最高 5 萬。: (After account opening) Basic account: Maximum NT$10,000 per transaction, NT$30,000 per day, NT$50,000 per month.
translations.***只要不是 firstrade.com 都是詐騙！都是詐騙！都是詐騙！***: ***If it's not firstrade.com, it's a scam! It's a scam! It's a scam!***
translations.***如果沒出現匯款資料可選擇，請再等幾天匯款資料進來。(剛到帳不一定會馬上出現: ***If no remittance information appears, please wait a few more days for the data to arrive. (It may not show up immediately after the funds arrive)***
translations.***雖然 LINE Bank 只跟我們收 TWD $150，但實際匯費是超過: ***Although LINE Bank only charges us TWD $150, the actual remittance fee exceeds USD $25, so we still subsidize USD $25.***
translations.**⭐️️️️️️ 最重要的附言，請務必填寫**\n**⭐️️️️️️ 最重要的:
**⭐️️️️️️ The most important remark, please be sure to fill it in**  
**⭐️️️️️️ The most important remark, please be sure to fill it in**  
**⭐️️️️️️ The most important remark, please be sure to fill it in**  
**Enter according to the previous remittance information:** `8-digit account number + account holder name`  
As shown in the picture above: `12345678 ZXXXG CXXXG LI`
translations.**如果資料有填錯受款單位會拒收，需要支付退匯手續費重新匯款**\n: **If the beneficiary information is incorrect, the payment will be rejected, and you will need to pay a return fee and resend the transfer**
translations.**無痛整合 Line 轉帳：** 好友之間轉帳不用在透過 iPASS MONE: **Seamless LINE Transfer Integration:** No need to use iPASS MONEY for transfers between friends
translations.**自然人憑證則需要拿出我們剛申辦的自然人憑證卡靠卡完成驗證：**\n\n: **For the Citizen Digital Certificate, you need to use the newly issued certificate card and complete the card-to-card verification:**
translations.**自然人憑證驗證只支援 TP07 開頭，裡面有 NFC 感應晶片的卡片**\n: **The citizen digital certificate verification only supports cards starting with TP07 that contain an NFC chip**
**Enter the information from the previous step [Remittance Information](https://invest.firstrade.com/scripts/fundmgt/wire_instruction/){:target="_blank"}:**
translations.*Firstrade 有點問題，大約會有一天的空檔期：申請狀態消失、賬戶紀錄沒看: *Firstrade has some issues, causing about a one-day gap: the application status disappears, and the account record does not show the subsidy; after about another day, the deposit record appears!*
translations.*Memo: 這活動從 2025/01–06 就開始，目前已好評延長兩次 (20: *Memo: This promotion started from 2025/01–06 and has been extended twice due to positive feedback (extended from 2025/06 to 2025/12, then again from 2025/12 to 2026/06). **Please note the dates!***
translations.*一次匯款的金額越多，比率越低， **Firstrade 單筆入金超過 $10,: *The larger the amount per transfer, the lower the fee rate. **For Firstrade single deposits over $10,000 USD (about $310,000 TWD), you can apply for a fee rebate of up to $25 USD, up to three times per month, which must be requested within 30 days after the transfer (see the tutorial at the end).***
translations.*如果頁面是英文可以在上方選擇「繁體中文」更改語言。*\n\n: *If the page is in English, you can select "Traditional Chinese" at the top to change the language.*
translations.*技術上 **詐騙信件、假網站能做到一模ㄧ樣** ，真假難辨；網址部分：*\n\: *Technically, **scam emails and fake websites can look exactly the same**, making it hard to tell real from fake; regarding URLs:*
translations.*本文圖片中的匯款金額僅共參考。(有的圖是 5萬、有的是 10 萬)*\n\n: *The remittance amounts shown in the images are for reference only. (Some images show 50,000, others 100,000)*
translations.*活動內容：外幣匯出手續費優惠價每筆NT$150元(原價NT$600元)、外幣匯: *Promotion: Foreign currency remittance fee is NT$150 per transaction (originally NT$600), and foreign currency deposit fee is NT$50 per transaction (originally NT$400)*
translations.*活動期間：原活動期間為2026/1/1~2026/6/30*\n\n: *Promotion Period: The original promotion period is from 2026/1/1 to 2026/6/30*
translations.*活動產品：外幣匯出匯款、外幣匯入匯款*\n\n: *Promotional Products: Foreign Currency Outward Remittance, Foreign Currency Inward Remittance*
translations.*自然人憑證的感應範圍有一點小，我重新試了好幾次才成功；iPhone 用鏡頭中間: *The NFC range of the Citizen Digital Certificate is quite small. I tried several times before succeeding; on iPhone, hold the camera near the center of the card and move the card slightly left and right. After a few attempts, the verification will succeed.*
translations.*開戶姓名請務必使用護照名。*\n\n: *Please make sure to use the name on your passport for account opening.*
translations.- (After account opening) Basic account::
- (After account opening) Basic account: Maximum NT$10,000 per transaction, NT$30,000 per day, NT$50,000 per month.

- (After customer service video call) Account upgrade: Maximum NT$50,000 per transaction, NT$100,000 per day, NT$200,000 per month.

- (After Natural Person Certificate + Customer Service Video Verification) Designated Account: Maximum NT$500,000 per transaction.
translations.- **Processing Fee: $250 NTD**\n\n- On-s:
- **Processing Fee: $250 NTD**

- On-site processing and issuance

- Few people apply for the Citizen Digital Certificate at the Household Registration Office, which usually remains open during lunch.
translations.- Account Opening, Interface, and Featur:
- Account Opening, Interface, and Features Are Simple and Friendly for US Stock Beginners

- Supports Chinese Interface

- Trade with Zero Fees

- Established Brokerage
translations.- After adding, an exclamation mark will:
- After adding, an exclamation mark will appear at the top right corner, indicating it is not yet effective.

- **Takes effect after 2 days.**
translations.- Easy Account Opening: If you have cred:
- Easy Account Opening: If you have credit records with other banks, you can open an account online by simply filling out the form.

- Interbank transfers free of charge: up to 50 times/month

- **Seamless LINE Transfer Integration:** No need to use iPASS MONEY for transfers between friends

- Currency exchange available 24/7

- Multiple flexible high-interest deposit plans available for you to mix and match

- Personal Loan: Fast / Integrated / Easy 10-Year Payment

- Securities: Invest in Taiwan stocks starting from 100 NTD
translations.- If the transaction details are not con:
- If the transaction details are not confirmed within 60 seconds, the exchange rate quote may be updated.

- No problem, just click "Next" to **complete the remittance application**.
translations.- On non-holidays, the transfer can be c:
- On non-holidays, the transfer can be completed on the same day at the earliest. On holidays, it will be processed on the second business day after.

- **If the beneficiary information is incorrect, the payment will be rejected, and you will need to pay a return fee and resend the transfer**
translations.- Please ensure your internet connection:
- Please ensure your internet connection is stable.

- Ensure video call is available
translations.- Please note this applies only when the:
- Please note this applies only when the designated account is already linked or the amount is less than 50,000. The first time you link a designated account, it will take +2 days to take effect.

- Line Bank shows the beneficiary bank has received the funds, but there is a time lag before Firstrade actually receives the money. (It likely waits until Firstrade completes processing during business hours before showing as received.)

- There may be a delay when applying for the remittance subsidy (for single transfers over $10,000) after Firstrade receives the funds. If you don't see the record, please check again later or the next day.
translations.- Remittance Amount Requirement: **Singl:
- Remittance Amount Requirement: **Single transaction** over $10,000 USD

- Maximum subsidy amount: $25 USD

- Limit: Up to 3 times per month

- Application period: Apply within 30 days after remittance
translations.- Remittance NTD $10,000 / Fee NTD $150:
- Remittance NTD $10,000 / Fee NTD $150 = 1.5%

- Remittance NTD $50,000 / Fee NTD $150 = 0.3%

- Remittance NTD $300,000 / Fee NTD $150 = 0.05%

- Remittance NTD $500,000 / Fee NTD $150 = 0.03%
translations.- Remitting Financial Institution Name::
- Remitting Financial Institution Name: `LINE Bank Taiwan Limited`

- Remittance fee charged by the financial institution: `25`
translations.- Select \"262 Invest in Foreign Equity:
- Select "262 Invest in Foreign Equity Securities"

- Click "Agree" to acknowledge the important notes
translations.- The designated account will take 2 day:
- The designated account will take 2 days to become effective.

- The designated account must first pass verification with a National Identification Certificate.

- **The citizen digital certificate verification only supports cards starting with TP07 that contain an NFC chip**
translations.1. Beneficiary Bank Information — SWIFT:
1. Beneficiary Bank Information — SWIFT Code

2. Beneficiary Account Name

3. Recipient's English Address

4. Recipient Account Number

5. **Postscript**
translations.1. Beneficiary's English Account Name: `:
1. Beneficiary's English Account Name: `Apex Clearing Corporation`

2. Beneficiary Bank Information — Automatically filled by entering the SWIFT code directly

3. Enter search: `HATRUS44`

4. Choose the first one: `HATRUS44 — BMO Bank N.A CHICAGO`

5. Recipient account number: `1617711` **(may change, please refer to actual information)**
translations.1. Click \"More\"\n\n2. Scroll down to t:
1. Click "More"

2. Scroll down to the "Foreign Exchange" section → Click "Remit Overseas"

3. Choose the debit currency: "TWD or USD," and enter the remittance amount.  
   **Please refer to the Line Bank account upgrade and designated account binding tutorial below first.**  
   **Please refer to the Line Bank account upgrade and designated account binding tutorial below first.**  
   **Please refer to the Line Bank account upgrade and designated account binding tutorial below first.**  
   **Otherwise, you can only remit up to 10,000 TWD.**

4. Click "Go to Remittance"
translations.1. Recipient Type: `Private (Corporate,:
1. Recipient Type: `Private (Corporate, Individual)`

2. Recipient's English Address — Country: select `United States`

3. Recipient's English Address — City/District: Enter `Texas`

4. Recipient's English Address — Detailed address: `One Dallas Center 350 N. St Paul, Suite 1300, Dallas, TX 75201` (Refer to the previous step's remittance information)

5. **⭐️️️️️️ The most important remark, please be sure to fill it in**  
   **⭐️️️️️️ The most important remark, please be sure to fill it in**  
   **⭐️️️️️️ The most important remark, please be sure to fill it in**  
   **Enter according to the previous remittance information:** `8-digit account number + account holder name`  
   As shown in the picture above: `12345678 ZXXXG CXXXG LI`

6. Click "Next"

translations.Firstrade 收到錢要申請匯款補貼(單筆超過一萬鎂)也會有時間差，沒看到紀: There may be a delay when applying for the remittance subsidy (for single transfers over $10,000) after Firstrade receives the funds. If you don't see the record, please check again later or the next day.
translations.Line Bank App 進度查詢通知(如前文)，往下滑有一個「申請水單/交易: In the Line Bank App progress notification (as mentioned earlier), scroll down to find the "Request Receipt/Transaction Certificate" button. Clicking it will send the remittance slip to your email, which you can open using your ID number.
translations.Line Bank 入金 Firstrade 及帳戶升級約定與手續費補助完整圖文: Line Bank Deposit to Firstrade, Account Upgrade Agreement, and Fee Subsidy Complete Step-by-Step Guide
translations.Line Bank 顯示受款銀行已收到 到 Firstrade 真的收到錢會有時: Line Bank shows the beneficiary bank has received the funds, but there is a time lag before Firstrade actually receives the money. (It likely waits until Firstrade completes processing during business hours before showing as received.)
translations.[入金 $10,000 美元以上，可以申請最高為 $25 美元手續費補助](ht: [Deposit over $10,000 USD to apply for a wire fee rebate up to $25 USD](https://www.firstrade.com/zh-TW/accounts/wire-fee-rebate){:target="_blank"} (up to three times per month)
translations.[登入 Firstrade 後選擇「客戶服務」 → 「特惠活動」→ 「匯費補貼」: [After logging into Firstrade, select "Customer Service" → "Special Offers" → "Wire Fee Rebate."](https://invest.firstrade.com/cgi-bin/main#/content/customerservice/promos/wirerebate/){:target="_blank"}
translations.「我的匯款紀錄」 → 「匯款約定帳號」 → 選擇帳戶 → 輸入金額 → 選擇「以: "My Remittance Records" → "Remittance Designated Account" → Select Account → Enter Amount → Choose "Remit via Designated Account" → All information will be filled automatically.
translations.「我的賬戶」 →「賬戶記錄」也會有存款紀錄可查詢。\n\n: "My Account" → "Account Records" will also have deposit records available for inquiry.
translations.下滑找到「外匯」區塊 → 點擊「匯款至海外」\n: Scroll down to the "Foreign Exchange" section → Click "Remit Overseas"
translations.不管信件的樣式如何跟真的一樣，請注意寄件人是否為 **firstrade.com: No matter how authentic the email looks, always check if the sender is **firstrade.com** and do not click any links in the email. **If you must click, double-check that the URL is from firstrade.com.**
translations.信貸：快速/整合/10年輕鬆付\n: Personal Loan: Fast / Integrated / Easy 10-Year Payment
translations.其實就是提升到其他銀行的基礎限額。 **(這一步不用自然人憑證。)**\n\n: This step actually just raises the basic limit to other banks. **(No need for the National ID card here.)**
translations.剛新增完，右上角會有一個驚嘆號，提示尚未生效。\n: After adding, an exclamation mark will appear at the top right corner, indicating it is not yet effective.
translations.務必到「我的賬戶」 → 「設定」 → 啟用「身份驗證應用」。\n\n: Be sure to go to "My Account" → "Settings" → Enable "Authenticator App".
translations.匯款金融機構名稱： `LINE Bank Taiwan Limited`\n: Remitting Financial Institution Name: `LINE Bank Taiwan Limited`
translations.匯款金額要求： **單筆** 大於 $10,000 美元\n: Remittance Amount Requirement: **Single transaction** greater than $10,000 USD
translations.受款人帳號： `1617711` **(可能會變，請以實際資訊為主)**\n: Recipient account number: `1617711` **(may change, please refer to actual information)**
translations.受款人英文地址 — 國家：選擇 `United States`\n: Recipient's English Address — Country: select `United States`

translations.受款銀行資訊 — 直接填寫 SWIFT 代碼自動帶入\n: Beneficiary Bank Information — Automatically filled by entering the SWIFT code directly
translations.可以去「我的賬戶」 →「賬戶記錄」中查看匯費補貼記錄。\n\n: You can check the fee subsidy records in "My Account" → "Account Records".
translations.可以從 LINE Bank App 右上角通知找到，外幣匯出通知，點擊進入查看匯: You can find the foreign currency transfer notification in the top right notification area of the LINE Bank App. Click it to check the transfer progress.
translations.多種彈性高利率存款方案可自行搭配選擇\n: Multiple flexible high-interest deposit plans available for you to mix and match
translations.大約在 2–3 個工作天左右就能收到匯款補貼囉。\n\n: It usually takes about 2–3 business days to receive the remittance subsidy.
translations.如上圖雖然 8/27 AM 09:00 就已收到款項，但是到 8/28 AM 0: As shown in the image above, although the funds were received on 8/27 at 9:00 AM, Firstrade only confirmed the funds and sent the deposit notification email at 8/28 2:10 AM:
translations.如果 60 秒內無法確認交易內容，匯率報價可能會進行更新。\n: If the transaction details are not confirmed within 60 seconds, the exchange rate quote may be updated.
translations.帳戶一切準備就緒之後我們就能開始入金囉。\n\n: Once your account is fully set up, you can start funding it.
translations.帳戶資訊同前文介紹的匯款資訊，依序填入，確認無誤後點擊「下一步」。\n\n: Enter the account information as introduced earlier in the remittance details. After confirming everything is correct, click "Next."
translations.戶政事務所辦理自然人憑證的人不多、中午一般不休息\n: Few people apply for the Citizen Digital Certificate at the Household Registration Office, and they generally do not close during lunch.
translations.打開 LINE Bank App →「更多」 → 下滑找到外匯，點擊「我的匯款紀: Open the LINE Bank App → "More" → scroll down to Foreign Exchange, tap "My Remittance Records" → "Remittance Designated Account" → "Add Designated Account".
translations.打開 LINE Bank App 在「更多」下滑找到「其他」 → 「帳戶升級」，: Open the LINE Bank App, scroll down under "More" to find "Others" → "Account Upgrade," select the type of account to upgrade → choose **2. Video Verification "Start Verification >".**
translations.扣款金額選擇「台幣 or 美元」、輸入要匯款的金額\n**請先參考下方 Line:
Choose the debit amount currency: "TWD or USD," and enter the amount to remit.  
**Please refer to the Line Bank account upgrade and designated account binding tutorial below first.**  
**Please refer to the Line Bank account upgrade and designated account binding tutorial below first.**  
**Please refer to the Line Bank account upgrade and designated account binding tutorial below first.**  
**Otherwise, you can only remit up to 10,000 TWD.**
translations.最後一部，確認一下資訊是否輸入正確，尤其是受款人帳戶資訊跟 **附言部分** 。: The final step is to verify that the information entered is correct, especially the recipient's account details and the **memo section**.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.本文僅為個人操作分享，不保證完全正確，一切使用請以實際為主，作者不為使用上的損失: This article is for personal experience sharing only and does not guarantee complete accuracy. Please rely on actual conditions when using. The author is not responsible for any losses incurred.
translations.次數限制：每月最多 3 次\n: Limit: Up to 3 times per month
translations.比較推薦的是直接約定 Firstrade 匯款帳戶為約定帳戶，方便快速又安全。\: It is recommended to directly set the Firstrade remittance account as the designated account for convenience, speed, and security.
translations.沒問題點擊「下一步」就 **完成匯款申請了**\n: No problem, just click "Next" to **complete the remittance application**.
translations.申請時間：匯款後 30 天內提出申請\n: Application period: Apply within 30 days after the remittance
translations.看到這畫面代表匯款申請已完成，請靜待到帳通知。\n\n: Seeing this screen means your remittance application is complete. Please wait for the deposit notification.
translations.第一次綁定需要完成「自然人憑證驗證」與「視訊驗證」，視訊驗證同帳戶升級需要跟客服: The first binding requires completing both the "Citizen Digital Certificate Verification" and "Video Verification." The video verification for account upgrade must be done via a video call with customer service to verify account information.
translations.約定帳戶需要 2 天後才會生效\n: The designated account will take 2 days to become effective.
translations.約定帳戶需要先通過自然人憑證驗證\n: The designated account must first pass verification with a National Identification Certificate.
translations.請先在線上 [完成填寫自然人申請表格](https://moica.nat.go: Please first complete the online [Natural Person Application Form](https://moica.nat.gov.tw/rac_form.html){:target="_blank"}:
translations.請先確保網路正常穩定\n: Please ensure your internet connection is stable.
translations.請注意以上是建立在約定帳戶都已綁定完成或是金額小於 5 萬的情況，第一次綁定約定: Please note this applies only when the designated account is already linked or the amount is less than 50,000. The first time you link a designated account, it will take +2 days to take effect.
translations.證券：100元起投資台股\n: Securities: Invest in Taiwan stocks starting from 100 NTD
translations.跨行轉帳免手續費：最高 50次/月\n: Interbank transfers free of charge: up to 50 times/month
translations.送出後，7 天內到任何地方戶政事務所(不用是戶籍地)櫃檯都能辦理。\n\n: After submission, you can complete the process at any Household Registration Office counter within 7 days (it does not have to be your registered residence).
translations.這是我們使用 LINE Bank 最大的誘因，到 2026/06/30 之前用: This is our biggest incentive to use LINE Bank: until 2026/06/30, depositing funds into Firstrade using a LINE Bank account only incurs a 150 TWD handling fee, with no telegraphic transfer or other fees.
translations.這是正常的，雖然在 Line Bank 上看到匯款狀態是「受款行已收到款項」匯款: This is normal. Although the remittance status on LINE Bank shows "Beneficiary bank has received the funds" and the transfer is complete, Firstrade still needs to wait for US business hours to confirm the funds.
translations.這時候再登入 Firstrade 就能看到資金進來囉，可以開始操作美股投資：\n: At this point, log in to Firstrade to see the funds credited, and you can start trading US stocks:
translations.這樣在陌生裝置登入都需要先完成兩階段驗證才能登入。\n\n: This way, logging in on an unfamiliar device requires completing two-factor authentication first.
translations.這次遇到要設定約定帳戶，因為 LINE Bank 沒有實體銀行，只能透過自然人憑: This time, I had to set up a designated account. Since LINE Bank has no physical branches, it requires authentication via the National Identification Card. So, I had to visit the household registration office to apply for the card before using the service, which is more troublesome than going directly to a bank.
translations.這邊以我 10/14 入金到 Firstrade 到最後拿到匯款補貼的時間軸。\: Here is the timeline from my deposit to Firstrade on 10/14 to finally receiving the remittance subsidy.
translations.選擇「262 投資國外股權證券」\n: Select "262 Invest in Foreign Equity Securities"
translations.選擇「匯款」 → 「匯款信息」，會開啟一個 PDF 檔案，可以把這個檔案儲存下來: Select "Remittance" → "Remittance Information" to open a PDF file. You can save this file for easy reference when making deposits later:
translations.選擇第一個： `HATRUS44 — BMO Bank N.A CHICAGO`: Choose the first one: `HATRUS44 — BMO Bank N.A CHICAGO`
translations.金融機構所收匯款費用： `25`\n: Remittance fee charged by the financial institution: `25`
translations.開戶、介面、功能簡單，美股小白友善\n: Account Opening, Interface, and Features Are Simple and Friendly for US Stock Beginners
translations.開戶簡單：有其他銀行聯徵紀錄只需網路填寫資料就能開戶\n: Easy Account Opening: If you have credit records with other banks, you can open an account online by simply filling out the form.
translations.需要完成雙相簡訊驗證，跳到剛收到的簡訊輸入四位數驗證碼；等待約 1–2 分鐘，收: You need to complete two-factor SMS verification by switching to the newly received message and entering the four-digit code; wait about 1–2 minutes, and receiving a confirmation SMS means the verification is complete.
translations.非假日最快當天就匯款成功，假日就要等 2 天後上班日才會處理\n: On non-holidays, the transfer can be completed on the same day at the earliest. On holidays, it will be processed on the second business day after.
translations.首先來介紹 Line Bank 如何入金到 Firstrade。\n\n: First, let's introduce how to deposit funds from Line Bank to Firstrade.
translations.驗證成功後，約定帳戶就新增成功囉！\n\n: After successful verification, the designated account will be added successfully!
translations.點擊「同意」申報注意事項\n: Click "Agree" to declare the important notes
translations.點擊後就會播視訊電話給客服人員，會需要跟客服對話視訊，可能會再跟你確認一下帳戶資: Clicking will start a video call with customer service. You will need to have a video conversation with the representative, who may verify your account information (e.g., ask about your current balance). Once confirmed, your account upgrade will be complete.
